description: This file defines a React functional component named AppShell, which provides the layout for a dashboard application. It includes sidebar navigation, a topbar with search and actions, and a main content area that renders child routes via React Router's Outlet. The layout utilizes React hooks like useMemo for dynamic page title determination based on current URL.

methods.name: AppShell()
methods.description: React functional component that renders the dashboard layout with navigation, header, and main content.
